text.title: Interface Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from architecture map to validated interface inventory.

step.name: enumerate
step.action: List every external interface (HTTP, message bus, file, UI, hardware). Bind unique id per interface.

step.name: bind-contract
step.action: Locate or author OpenAPI / AsyncAPI / JSON Schema / Avro contract per interface. contract.ref points to file.
step.decision-gate: If no machine-readable contract exists, author one before continuing.

step.name: assign-owners-and-errors
step.action: Name producer + consumer owner. Enumerate error_codes with retry semantics. Define idempotency strategy.

step.name: declare-sla
step.action: Fill latency_p95_ms, availability_pct, throughput_rps, degradation_policy. Sourcing from measured data preferred over targets.

step.name: link-fixtures-and-version
step.action: Bind happy_path + failure_paths fixtures per interface. Bump inventory version_tag (semver). Validate JSON against schema.
